interfaces.name: getHomePageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the homepage including mission highlights and featured services, groups, resources, and donation campaigns.

actionKey.description: Key used by the UI to route the user, e.g., 'schedule_speech_evaluation', 'find_therapist', 'find_clinic_near_me'

interfaces.name: getServicesOverview
interfaces.description: List all therapy services with brief descriptions and age ranges for the Services Overview page.

interfaces.name: getServiceDetail
interfaces.description: Get in-depth information about a specific service for the Service Detail page.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: ID of the Service to load, e.g., for service_detail.html?serviceId=speech_therapy

interfaces.name: getServiceRelatedContent
interfaces.description: Get related therapists, groups, resources, and pricing summary for a given service.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: ID of the Service whose related content should be shown.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get mission, history, philosophy, policy sections, and general contact info for the About & Contact page.

interfaces.name: submitGeneralContactRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a general contact or inquiry form from the About & Contact page.

interfaces.name: getTherapistFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the Therapist Directory (specialties, age groups, locations, languages, insurance).

interfaces.name: searchTherapists
interfaces.description: Search therapists in the directory with filters and sorting.

interfaces.name: getTherapistProfile
interfaces.description: Get full profile information for a therapist.

interfaces.name: addTherapistToFavorites
interfaces.description: Add a therapist to the single user's favorites list.

interfaces.name: removeTherapistFromFavorites
interfaces.description: Remove a therapist from the single user's favorites list.

interfaces.name: getFavoriteTherapists
interfaces.description: Get all therapists saved in the user's favorites list for the Saved Therapists page.

interfaces.name: submitTherapistAppointmentRequest
interfaces.description: Submit an appointment request preferring a specific therapist, using a simple preferred day/time range form.

interfaces.name: getAppointmentBookingConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration and default selections for the Appointment Booking page, including services, locations, and appointment types.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: Optional preselected serviceId when navigating from a service page.

parameters.name: therapistId
parameters.description: Optional preselected therapistId when navigating from a therapist page.

parameters.name: locationId
parameters.description: Optional preselected locationId when navigating from a location page.

interfaces.name: findAvailableAppointmentSlots
interfaces.description: Find available appointment slots for a given service, location, date range, and constraints.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start of the date range, format 'YYYY-MM-DD'

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End of the date range, format 'YYYY-MM-DD'

parameters.name: earliestStartTime
parameters.description: Optional earliest start time, 'HH:MM' in 24h format, e.g., '15:00' for 3:00 PM

interfaces.name: submitAppointmentRequest
interfaces.description: Submit an appointment or evaluation request, either for a specific slot or with preferred times.

interfaces.name: getResourceFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Parent Resources Library (age groups, content types, reading times).

interfaces.name: searchResources
interfaces.description: Search resources in the Parent Resources Library with filters and pagination.

interfaces.name: getArticleDetail
interfaces.description: Get full article content and metadata for the Article Detail page.

interfaces.name: saveResourceToReadingList
interfaces.description: Save a resource to the user's reading list.

interfaces.name: removeResourceFromReadingList
interfaces.description: Remove a resource from the user's reading list.

interfaces.name: getSavedReadingList
interfaces.description: Get all resources saved in the user's reading list for the Saved Reading List page.

interfaces.name: getGroupFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Groups & Classes listing (age groups, locations, price ranges, date presets).

interfaces.name: searchGroupPrograms
interfaces.description: Search group programs and classes with filters, sorting, and pagination.

interfaces.name: getGroupDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a group program on the Group Detail page.

interfaces.name: submitGroupRegistration
interfaces.description: Submit a registration for a group program and chosen session option.

interfaces.name: getPricingAndInsuranceOverview
interfaces.description: Get standard rates for services and list of accepted insurance plans for the Pricing & Insurance page.

interfaces.name: getCostEstimatorConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration for the multi-service cost estimator, including services and insurance plan options.

interfaces.name: calculateCostEstimate
interfaces.description: Calculate an estimated monthly total for a mix of services and an insurance plan.

interfaces.name: submitCostEstimateContactRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a contact request asking for a detailed monthly quote based on a cost estimate and custom message.

parameters.name: costEstimateId
parameters.description: Optional reference to a previously calculated cost estimate.

interfaces.name: getLocationFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Locations Finder page.

interfaces.name: searchClinicLocations
interfaces.description: Search for clinic locations near a ZIP code with distance, amenity, and hours filters.

interfaces.name: getLocationDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information about a clinic location for the Location Detail page.

interfaces.name: submitCallbackRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a request for the clinic to call the parent back from a specific location detail page.

interfaces.name: plannerStartNewPlan
interfaces.description: Start a new weekly therapy plan draft for the Weekly Planner page.

interfaces.name: plannerAddSessionToCurrentPlan
interfaces.description: Add a therapy session to the current weekly plan draft.

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Start time 'HH:MM' in 24h format, e.g., '16:00' for 4:00 PM

interfaces.name: plannerGetCurrentPlan
interfaces.description: Get the current weekly plan draft sessions for week view or summary.

interfaces.name: plannerSaveCurrentPlan
interfaces.description: Save the current weekly plan draft with a custom name.

interfaces.name: plannerUpdateSessionInCurrentPlan
interfaces.description: Update a session within the current weekly plan draft (optional editing support).

interfaces.name: plannerRemoveSessionFromCurrentPlan
interfaces.description: Remove a session from the current weekly plan draft.

interfaces.name: plannerListSavedPlans
interfaces.description: List saved weekly plans for the single user.

interfaces.name: plannerLoadSavedPlan
interfaces.description: Load a saved weekly plan into a new draft for viewing or editing.

interfaces.name: getDonationPageContent
interfaces.description: Get giving options, impact descriptions, and available funds for the Donate / Support Us page.

interfaces.name: submitDonationPledge
interfaces.description: Submit a donation or pledge, including fund allocation and optional dedication.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateFavoritesStore
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or initialize the single user's favorite therapists store in local storage or memory.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateSavedResourcesStore
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or initialize the single user's saved resources (reading list) store.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreatePlannerDraft
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to create or load the current weekly planner draft identified by planDraftId.

helperFunctions.name: _persistWeeklyPlan
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to save a weekly plan draft as a persistent WeeklyPlan and associated WeeklyPlanSession records.

helperFunctions.name: _createCostEstimateRecord
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to create CostEstimate and CostEstimateServiceItem records from calculator inputs.
